scripts.build: npm run build-customer && npm run build-admin && mkdir -p dist/admin && cp -r client-customer/build/. dist/ && cp -r client-admin/build/. dist/admin/
scripts.build-customer: cd client-customer && cross-env CI=false GENERATE_SOURCEMAP=false npm run build
scripts.build-admin: cd client-admin && cross-env CI=false GENERATE_SOURCEMAP=false npm run build
